mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_user_invite (inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, invite_code, create_time) values (#{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, #{inviteCode}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
select i.invite_id, i.inviter_user_id, i.invitee_user_id, i.invite_code, i.create_time, inviter.user_no as inviter_user_no, inviter.nick_name as inviter_nick_name, invitee.user_no as invitee_user_no, invitee.nick_name as invitee_nick_name from ai_c_user_invite i left join ai_c_user inviter on inviter.user_id = i.inviter_user_id left join ai_c_user invitee on invitee.user_id = i.invitee_user_id
and i.inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} and i.invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} and i.invite_code like concat('%', #{inviteCode}, '%')
order by i.invite_id desc
